title: geranium multiflorum var. forbesii
intro: Geranium multiflorum var. forbesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the Indian geranium or wild geranium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Geranium multiflorum var. forbesii include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
